plugin.label: OpenAI-Compatible API Provider
plugin.description: Official 1flowbase provider plugin for services that expose an OpenAI-compatible chat completion API, including host-driven LLM parameter schemas.

gpt_4o_mini.label: GPT-4o mini
gpt_4o_mini.description: Static default model shown before the dynamic catalog refresh completes.

demo.title: OpenAI-Compatible API Provider Demo
demo.subtitle: Use the local demo to load this plugin into plugin-runner, validate credentials, inspect /models, review parameter schemas, and send a chat completion.
